MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Eric D. Despotes, Esq., for Appellant/Defendant Barbara Ann Berwick, who is also present.
Rachel Marie Hample, and Dean Zulueta, Respondents/Plaintiffs

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Rachel Marie Hample and Dean Zulueta, Respondents/Plaintiffs, testify on their own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 -

Barbara Ann Berwick, Appellant/Defendant, testifies on her own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
